export const doctors = [
  {
    id: 101,
    name: "Dr. Suman Rai",
    specialty: "Internal Medicine",
    hospitalId: 1,
    experience: "10 years",
    qualification: "MBBS, MD Internal Medicine",
    availability: "Mon–Sat 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM",
    bio: "Special interest in diabetes, hypertension and preventive medicine.",
    image: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x400?text=Dr+Suman+Rai",
  },
  {
    id: 102,
    name: "Dr. Maya Thapa",
    specialty: "Physiotherapy",
    hospitalId: 1,
    experience: "7 years",
    qualification: "BPT, MPT Orthopedics",
    availability: "Tue–Fri 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM",
    bio: "Focus on musculoskeletal injuries and post-operative rehabilitation.",
    image: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x400?text=Dr+Maya+Thapa",
  },
  {
    id: 201,
    name: "Dr. Anita Sharma",
    specialty: "Gynecology",
    hospitalId: 2,
    experience: "12 years",
    qualification: "MBBS, MS Obstetrics & Gynecology",
    availability: "Mon–Fri 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM",
    bio: "Experienced in high-risk pregnancy and laparoscopic procedures.",
    image: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x400?text=Dr+Anita+Sharma",
  },
  // ← add more doctors here later
];
